title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates:
Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates!
